content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the yellow dashed center line visible bending rightward, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track following the curve correctly.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 82, target index = (82+5) % 121 = 87
- WP87: x=0.9965, y=4.2505
- Car: x=1.2477, y=4.3603, heading=-174.634°
- dy = 4.2505 - 4.3603 = -0.1098
- dx = 0.9965 - 1.2477 = -0.2512
- bearing = atan2(-0.1098, -0.2512) = 180° + atan(0.1098/0.2512) in third quadrant = -(180° - 23.6°) = **-156.4°** (southwest)
- delta = -156.4° - (-174.634°) = +18.23° → LEFT correction needed

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3786m, distance_from_center = 0.0529m, is_left_of_center=true
- edge_distance (left) = 0.3786 - 0.0529 = **0.3257m** → clear
- delta = +18.23° → steer left (away from right edge) → no boundary concern

Delta ≈ +18°: |delta| 15-30°, steer left: steering_angle=+10, speed=1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead and WP87 is to the left (delta≈+18°), requiring a moderate left correction to follow the waypoint line through the curve.",

    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends southwest with gentle-to-moderate left curve.",
    "WP70-85 section: heading ~-165 to -175°, delta oscillates requiring corrections.",
    "WP82-90 section: track curves sharply south/southeast, delta swings positive (left).",
    "Car consistently 0.05-0.11m left of center in WP80-86 section — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >45°.",
    "WP80+ region: track curves south/southeast back toward start — expect increasing positive delta.",
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length, car at ~69% progress."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.571, 1.457, 1.361, 1.248],
    "y": [4.366, 4.356, 4.353, 4.360],
    "heading": [-166.856, -168.581, -170.307, -174.634]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP87 at (0.997, 4.251): bearing≈-156.4°, delta≈+18.2° → moderate left correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 10.0
}
```
